meta.description: ForgeOS live architecture snapshot. Generated by Forge after reviewing server/index.js, server/builder.js, server/agent/forge.js, and client/src. Authoritative reference for all future builds and ForgeOS modifications.

architecture.model: Unified Agent — single Claude session handles chat, code generation, and ForgeOS self-modification
architecture.deploy_chain: Forge agent → GitHub (BrianBMorgan/ForgeOS, main) → Render auto-deploy → forge-os.ai
architecture.runtime: Node.js + Express (CommonJS) on server; React + Vite (TypeScript) on client
architecture.subdomain_proxy: Wildcard *.forge-os.ai requests proxied to published Render services — SSE streaming preserved via pipe, non-SSE via arrayBuffer
architecture.workspace_isolation: Each build run gets its own directory under DATA_DIR/workspaces/{runId}
architecture.static_files: client/dist served via express.static with SPA fallback

agent.entry: runForgeAgent({ projectId, userMessage, wsDir, history, skillContext, attachments, onMessage })
return_types: { type: 'message', message }  — pure chat, no build triggered
{ type: 'build', message, startCommand, installCommand, summary, envVars, files }  — task_complete called

tool_notes.github_patch: Surgical find-and-replace on GitHub files. Multiple replacements in one call. Fails if string not found exactly.
tool_notes.github_write: Full file rewrite + commit. Auto-fetches current SHA. Use for complete file replacements.
tool_notes.github_read: Read any ForgeOS file from GitHub with auth. Preferred over fetch_url for ForgeOS files.
tool_notes.task_complete: Returns __TASK_COMPLETE__ sentinel — triggers collectWorkspaceFiles() then buildAndDeploy()
tool_notes.run_command: Executes in wsDir with 15s timeout. Blocks: sudo, rm -rf, mkfs, dd, chmod 777, pipe-to-shell
tool_notes.memory_search: Calls brain.buildContext(query, projectId). 4s timeout before skipping.
tool_notes.write_file: Emits file_written event to onMessage callback. Creates parent dirs automatically.

agent.memory_filtering: Before injection, strips lines containing: build:, forge:, chat agent, scoped to, cannot modify forgeos, only via forge, read_forge_source, forgeos infrastructure
agent.history_scrubbing: Orphaned tool_use blocks (assistant turns with no following tool_result) are dropped before API call
agent.vision_support: Image attachments sent as base64 vision blocks in user message content array
agent.workspace_creation: New projects get a temp workspace dir (new-{projectId}-{timestamp}) created before first tool call
agent.premature_end_turn_guard: If stop_reason=end_turn with no tools called and message looks like work, pushes 'Use a tool to do that.' to continue

builder.role: Install + start pipeline only — no code generation (agent handles that)
sequence: 6. Health check (HTTP GET / after 3s delay, 5s timeout)
builder.failure_handling: brain.extractFailureMemory on install-failed or start-failed. run.status always set to 'completed' (workspace status captures the detail).

runs.POST /api/runs: Create run + fire buildAndDeploy (legacy direct build path)
runs.GET /api/runs/:id/logs: Get workspace logs. Query: since, level, source, search, limit
runs.GET /api/runs/:id/file/search: Search files by text. Query: text (min 2 chars)
runs.PATCH /api/runs/:id/file: Write file + restart app if running. Body: { path, content }

projects.POST /api/projects: Create project + store opening prompt in brain conversation. Returns { id, runId:null, name, prompt }
projects.GET /api/projects/:id: Full project detail with currentRun, workspace status, iterations
projects.POST /api/projects/:id/iterate: Direct build path (non-chat). Large prompt guard at 3000 chars returns requiresPlan:true
projects.POST /api/projects/:id/restart: Restart workspace — restores from snapshot if no lastStartCommand
projects.POST /api/projects/:id/exec: Shell command in workspace. Auto-wakes stopped workspace.

env_and_secrets.PUT /api/projects/:id/env: Set env var (key auto-uppercased, sanitized). Reserved keys blocked.

chat.POST /api/projects/:id/chat: PRIMARY BUILD + CHAT ROUTE. SSE streaming. Accepts { message, skillContext, attachments }. Events: thinking, agent_message, tool_status, file_written, run_created, done, error. Fires buildAndDeploy on task_complete.

publish.POST /api/projects/:id/publish: Publish to Render + register slug. Updates brain with URL.
publish.POST /api/projects/:id/rollback: Rollback to version. Body: { tag, commitSha }

brain.GET /api/brain: Brain summary: totals (projects, preferences, patterns, mistakes, snippets), topMistakes, recentProjects
brain.POST /api/brain/upvote/:id: Upvote a memory by numeric ID

analytics.POST /api/analytics/events: Ingest beacon events. Body: { projectId, events[] }

assets.POST /api/assets: Upload asset (busboy multipart, 10MB limit). Stored as base64 in Neon.
assets.GET /api/assets/:filename: Serve asset as binary with correct Content-Type

skills.POST /api/skills: Create skill. Body: { name, description, instructions, tags }
skills.POST /api/skills/import-url: Import from skillsmp.com, github.com, or raw.githubusercontent.com. Parses SKILL.md frontmatter.

database_viewer.GET /api/db/tables/:name: Table schema + row count
database_viewer.POST /api/db/query: Run SELECT/UPDATE/INSERT/DELETE. Blocks: DROP, TRUNCATE, ALTER, CREATE, GRANT, REVOKE

diagnostics.GET /api/diagnostics: Internal-only (x-forge-internal: 1 header or same-host). Runs chat manager diagnostics. Query: project_id, checks

preview_proxy.ALL /preview/:runId/*: Proxies to workspace app on localhost:{port}. HTML rewritten: root-relative paths prefixed with /preview/{runId}, fetch/XHR/history patched via injected script. SSE not supported (buffers HTML/CSS, pipes binary). Inspector script injected for element selection postMessage.

components.App.tsx: Root. Manages project selection, global state, tab routing between Projects/Workspace/Brain/Settings/Assets/DB.
components.ProjectsList.tsx: Project cards grid. Create/delete/select projects. Shows status badges.
components.Workspace.tsx: Main workspace view (87KB). Tabs: Preview, Files, Logs, Iterations, Analytics, Env Vars. Preview via /preview/:runId iframe. File editor. Log streaming.
components.PromptColumn.tsx: Chat UI (18KB). SSE stream consumer. chatEndRef for scroll-to-bottom, chatThreadRef for thread container scroll. Handles all SSE event types: thinking, agent_message, tool_status, file_written, run_created, done, error. Image attachment support.
components.Settings.tsx: Global settings, secrets vault, skills manager, HubSpot integration config.
components.Assets.tsx: Asset library — upload, list, delete, copy URL.
components.DbTab.tsx: Database viewer — table list, schema, row browser, SQL query runner.

server_modules.server/memory/brain.js: Brain DB interface. ensureSchema, buildContext, extractMemory, extractFailureMemory, appendConversation, getConversation, getBrainSummary, upvoteMemory, updatePublishedUrl.
server_modules.server/projects/manager.js: Project CRUD, iteration tracking, env var management, workspace file capture.
server_modules.server/workspace/manager.js: Workspace lifecycle: createWorkspace, writeFiles, installDeps, startApp, stopApp, stopAllApps, restartApp, restoreWorkspace, listWorkspaceFiles, readWorkspaceFile, writeWorkspaceFile, searchWorkspaceFiles, execCommand, getWorkspaceStatus, getWorkspaceLogs, touchActivity, isStaticSite.
server_modules.server/publish/manager.js: Render publish/unpublish, slug management, custom domains, version tracking, rollback, export to zip, restorePublishedApps on startup.
server_modules.server/analytics/manager.js: Event ingestion and analytics queries. ensureSchema on startup.
server_modules.server/assets/manager.js: Asset storage in Neon (base64). ensureSchema on startup.
server_modules.server/settings/manager.js: Global settings, secrets vault (encrypted at rest), skills CRUD. getSecretsAsObject for env injection.
server_modules.server/pipeline/runner.js: Run lifecycle: createRun, saveRunSnapshot, getRun, getRunSync, getAllRuns.
server_modules.server/integrations/hubspot.js: HubSpot CRM: getStatus, searchContacts, createContact, searchDeals, createDeal.

required.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: Claude API key. Used in runForgeAgent. Read at request time.
required.NEON_DATABASE_URL: Neon PostgreSQL connection string. Used by brain, projects, analytics, assets, settings.
required.GITHUB_TOKEN: GitHub PAT. Used by github_read, github_write, github_patch tools and skill import.
required.RENDER_API_KEY: Render API key for publish/unpublish operations.
required.RENDER_SERVICE_ID: Target Render service ID for deployments.

optional.DATA_DIR: Root for workspaces/ and published/ directories. Defaults to parent of server/.
optional.HUBSPOT_ACCESS_TOKEN: HubSpot private app token. If set, HubSpot CRM skill auto-seeded on startup.

env_vars.workspace_env_injection_order: Global defaults → Global secrets → Project env vars (project vars win)

startup_sequence: 1. Ensure workspaces/ and published/ directories exist
4. Auto-restore active/building projects: find from DB, restoreWorkspace for each
7. HubSpot skill auto-seed if HUBSPOT_ACCESS_TOKEN present and skill not yet created

conventions.module_system: CommonJS (require/module.exports) throughout server. ES modules in client (Vite/React).
conventions.api_keys: Read from process.env at request time — never cached at module load.
conventions.error_responses: { error: 'message' } with appropriate HTTP status. Never expose raw API errors to client.
conventions.no_dotenv: Platform injects env vars at runtime. No dotenv require anywhere.
conventions.file_storage: In-memory or Neon DB. No disk writes for user data.
conventions.html_delivery: GET / must return complete HTML. Never JSON or redirect from root.
conventions.url_style: Root-relative everywhere (/api/...). No hardcoded localhost URLs. No base tags.
conventions.sse_pattern: res.setHeader Content-Type: text/event-stream + Cache-Control: no-cache + Connection: keep-alive + flushHeaders(). Data: JSON.stringify(evt)\n\n
conventions.agent_terminology: Use 'reforge' not 'refactor'. Use 'I'll make this update' for improvements. Reserve 'I found the bug' for actual runtime errors.
conventions.workspace_port: Agent builds start on 4000. Platform assigns available port if taken.
conventions.large_prompt_guard: Prompts > 3000 chars via /api/projects/:id/iterate (non-chat) return { error: 'large_prompt', requiresPlan: true }. Chat route has no limit.
conventions.skill_import: SKILL.md frontmatter parsed: name, description (first sentence), instructions (rest + body). Supports skillsmp.com slugs, github.com paths, raw.githubusercontent.com URLs.
conventions.preview_proxy_rewriting: HTML paths rewritten to /preview/{runId}/... prefix. fetch/XHR/history patched via injected script. Inspector postMessage bridge for element selection.
conventions.subdomain_proxy_sse: SSE responses piped directly chunk by chunk. Non-SSE buffered via arrayBuffer. Redirect Location headers rewritten from Render URL to proxy URL.

design_system.css_file: client/src/index.css (103KB — full design system, do not rewrite entire file for surgical changes)

mission_control.description: Standalone dashboard app (separate workspace project) for monitoring ForgeOS infrastructure
mission_control.stack: Mode A — plain Node.js/Express, vanilla JS, inline HTML/CSS

panels.recent_commits: GitHub API GET /repos/BrianBMorgan/ForgeOS/commits. 20 commits, 30s polling, 10s timeout. Auth header only sent when GITHUB_TOKEN present.
panels.brain_memory: Proxies /api/brain from forge-os.ai. Shows breakdown: patterns, preferences, snippets, mistakes, projects.
panels.render_logs: GET /v1/logs?ownerId=...&resource=...&limit=40&direction=backward. Requires ownerId extracted from service detail first.

mission_control.render_status_normalization: not_suspended → LIVE (green). suspended → SUSPENDED (red). Reads top-level suspended field, not serviceDetails.status.

brain_db_schema.api_endpoint: GET /api/brain → { totals: { projects, preferences, patterns, mistakes, snippets }, topMistakes[], recentProjects[] }

known_issues_and_gotchas.chatThreadRef: PromptColumn.tsx requires both chatEndRef (scroll sentinel div) AND chatThreadRef (thread container div). Both must be declared with useRef. chatEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView() for auto-scroll; chatThreadRef for the scrollable container itself.
known_issues_and_gotchas.github_patch_exactness: find string must be character-for-character exact including whitespace and newlines. Use github_read first if unsure.
known_issues_and_gotchas.orphaned_tool_use: If agent loop breaks mid-call, history may have assistant tool_use with no following tool_result. Brain conversation scrubber drops these on next load.
known_issues_and_gotchas.workspace_port_collision: stopAllApps() called before each new build to prevent EADDRINUSE. Iterations stop the previous workspace first.
known_issues_and_gotchas.render_api_suspended_field: Render web service status is top-level .suspended ('not_suspended'/'suspended'), not serviceDetails.status.
known_issues_and_gotchas.asset_storage: Assets stored base64-encoded in Neon to avoid UTF-8 errors with binary files (docx, xlsx, pdf). Decoded to binary on GET.
known_issues_and_gotchas.skill_import_max_attempts: resolveSkillFromSlug has MAX_ATTEMPTS=30 guard to prevent runaway GitHub API calls on ambiguous slugs.
known_issues_and_gotchas.large_prompt_guard: Only applies to /api/projects/:id/iterate (non-chat route). /api/projects/:id/chat has no prompt size limit.
known_issues_and_gotchas.analytics_beacon: Published apps must include tracker script that posts to /api/analytics/events for analytics to populate.
known_issues_and_gotchas.db_viewer_sql_safety: DROP/TRUNCATE/ALTER/CREATE/GRANT/REVOKE blocked. UPDATE/INSERT/DELETE allowed — no read-only enforcement beyond destructive DDL.
